title: DocType
description: A Frappe/ERPNext DocType document, the base object returned by all resource endpoints.

name.description: Unique identifier (primary key) of the document.

doctype.description: The DocType name, e.g. Customer, Employee, Sales Invoice.

owner.description: The user who created the document.

creation.description: Timestamp when the document was created.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the document.
